assertions.assertion: Response shows ApiScope as a top-level independent object rather than nested under ApiResource
Response shows ApiResource.Scopes containing string scope names instead of Scope objects
Response includes registering API scopes separately via AddInMemoryApiScopes or equivalent
Response warns about data loss if using auto-generated EF Core migrations for the v3 to v4 ConfigurationDbContext schema change
Response mentions the table renames from v3 to v4 (e.g., ApiClaims to ApiResourceClaims, ApiProperties to ApiResourceProperties, or similar)
